title: About Me
paragraphs: Hello, I'm Naveen Kumar, a UI/UX designer with an edge in digital product design, User experience, and interaction design.

I originally started off as a Computer Science major during undergrad but quickly realized that I was fascinated by the 'Why' behind the code I was writing. This led me to explore the field of UI/UX, and after a few side projects and freelance work, I fell in love with the art of problem-solving.
I like to think of myself as a full-stack product designer who can lead a project from research & design to the prototyping phase to ensure a smooth developer handoff.
